title: WorkAssignmentType
description: WorkAssignment associates a Job and/or Position with a Worker.

typeCode.description: The type of work assignment between the Employer or Contractee Organization and the worker.

assignmentTermTypeCode.description: DEPRECATED - Use workTermTypeCode in the work agreement.

assignmentLifeCyle.description: DEPRECATED - workAgreement and related work assignment properties.

workAgreements.description: The work agreements for a work assignment.

status.description: The work agreement for a work assignment

jobId.description: Identifier of the job to which the work assignment is related; alternatively use job.

positionId.description: Identifier of the position to which the work assignment is related; alternatively use position.

job.description: The job to which the work assignment is related.

position.description: The position to which the work assignment is related.

payCycleCode.description: Describes how often the payee is paid. Pay Frequency - The period of time covered by the employee's regular pay checks.

assignedOrganizations.description: The organization for which the worker in the work assignment does work.

workLocations.description: The location where the worker in the work assignment does work.
